user.title: Choose data source
user.description: Pick the data source (region) this board reads from. The available cities and stations depend on this choice.

city.title: Choose city
city.description: Start typing to search for a city or town — the station list on the next step is filtered to it.

station.title: Choose station
station.description: Stations in {city}. Start typing to search by name — the stop ID is filled in automatically. Walk time is how many minutes you need to reach the stop; departures sooner than that are hidden.

filters.title: What to show
filters.description: Choose whether this board shows departures or arrivals (one direction per stop — add the stop again for the other). Pick which transport types to show, or leave “All transport types” on to show everything this stop offers.

abort.already_configured: This stop is already configured for this source and direction.

init.title: Stop options
init.description: Adjust the walk time, number of departures and transport types. The data source and direction (departures or arrivals) are fixed when the stop is added.
